title: Bridge Essay: Repetitive speech elicits widespread deactivation in the human cortex: the "Mant

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Language as mantra — inner speech, mantra meditation, semantic cognition, focused attention.

**Repetitive speech elicits widespread deactivation in the human cortex: the "Mantra" effect?**. Brain Behav.. PMID: 26221571. DOI: 10.1002/brb3.346. BACKGROUND: Mantra (prolonged repetitive verbal utterance) is one of the most universal mental practices in human culture. However, the underlying neuronal mechanisms that may explain its powerful emotional and cognitive impact are unknown.
